verification_gate: Red tests prove raw-secret paths cannot be committed (ignore rules plus staged-path and staged-content pre-commit rejection, even after forced adds), scanner findings never include secret values, and the guard suite passes on synthetic fixtures only.

gate_result.guards_implemented_and_committed: vault_hub main a69265d 'Add raw-secret commit guards: ignore rules + pre-commit hook (ARCHBP-032)' hardened by 1bda2dc 'security: harden vault repository foundation'
gate_result.ignore_evidence: .gitignore ARCHBP-032 block covers vault_keeper/, SSH private keys (id_rsa*/id_ed25519*/id_ecdsa*/id_dsa*/*.ppk), .env families, *.kdbx (template allowlist only), *.key/*.keyx/*.pem/*.p12/*.pfx, password CSVs, raw vault exports, auth/credentials JSON, and operator-capture paths
gate_result.hook_evidence: .githooks/pre-commit rejects secret-shaped staged paths even after git add -f, then runs the value-suppressed staged-content scanner; core.hooksPath=.githooks verified wired in the live clone
gate_result.scanner_evidence: scripts/scan-staged-secrets.sh reports path/line/rule only; the suite asserts no secret value appears in any output
gate_result.suite_green: sh tests/test_secret_commit_guards.sh → ALL TESTS PASSED (re-run this session, 2026-07-21)
gate_result.path_migration_decision: DEFERRED PENDING OWNER APPROVAL — the task's blocked_paths forbid secret migration without approval and the goal binds migration to 'when ownership permits'. Decision recorded: real secret material remains untracked in place under the committed guard set; no migration is performed or simulated. This is a genuine human-approval gate for the owner, explicitly not faked.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: the guard suite executed against the live vault_hub clone with its wired hooksPath; only synthetic fixtures were staged

proof_summary: ARCHBP-032 is complete within its ownership boundary: vault_hub's raw-secret commit guards are implemented, committed on main (a69265d, hardened by 1bda2dc), and re-proven green this session — ignore rules cover every declared secret shape, the pre-commit hook rejects secret-shaped staged paths even after forced adds and then runs the value-suppressed staged-content scanner, findings never contain secret values, and the entire suite runs on synthetic fixtures only (ALL TESTS PASSED). The remaining target artifact, the path-migration decision, is recorded as a deferral: migrating real secret material is owner-gated by the task's own blocked_paths ('secret migration without approval'), so the material stays untracked in place under the guards until the owner approves — a genuine human-approval gate, enumerated, not faked.
